---
name: sample-ui-polish
description: "Use when: improving Angular UI layout, spacing, typography, color tokens, and responsive behavior with minimal functional changes."
---

# Sample UI Polish Skill

## Goal
Upgrade existing frontend screens to look intentional and modern while preserving behavior.

## Use When
- A page looks default or template-like.
- You want better visual hierarchy and spacing.
- You want mobile and desktop polish without changing backend APIs.

## Workflow
1. Inspect current template and styles first.
2. Keep data bindings and logic intact.
3. Define design tokens (color, spacing, radius, typography) in CSS variables.
4. Improve structure and readability with clear sections and headings.
5. Add subtle motion for page load and item reveal.
6. Verify responsive behavior at common breakpoints.

## Output Rules
- Preserve existing TypeScript logic unless asked to change behavior.
- Avoid external UI libraries unless requested.
- Ensure focus styles and readable contrast.
- Keep edits scoped to relevant frontend files.

## Quick Checklist
- [ ] Better hierarchy
- [ ] Cleaner spacing
- [ ] Responsive layout
- [ ] Accessible focus states
- [ ] No broken bindings
